name: concurrent-cl-gate accepts a candidate that is disjoint with every active CL across all five §2.23 dimensions
command: mkdir -p sessions && printf '%s' '{"session_id":"s1","phases":["E"],"lock_sections":["rubric"],"state_subsections":["commits"],"source_folders":["google-jsguide/x.yaml"],"branch":"feat/x"}' > sessions/s1.json && printf '%s' '{"session_id":"s2","phases":["F"],"lock_sections":["profiles"],"state_subsections":["spec_path"],"source_folders":["google-pyguide/y.yaml"],"branch":"feat/y"}' > cand.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/concurrent-cl-gate.sh" --sessions-dir sessions --candidate cand.json --allow-concurrent 2>out.txt && grep -q 'accept reason=disjoint_with_1_active_sessions' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
